products.name: HWM IoT Magnetic Water Meter
products.desc: IoT magnetic impeller water meter, NB-IoT/4G, anti-magnetic, IP68 three-chamber, 6+ year battery, optional IC card recharge.
products.overview: The HWM Series IoT Magnetic Water Meter uses a new-generation microprocessor to acquire and record water flow continuously, then transmit data to the management platform via NB-IoT / 4G for remote billing. Epoxy-moulded magnetic anti-tamper pin design resists external interference. Supports two-way communication for remote valve control and parameter setting.

products.name: HWM IoT Non-magnetic Water Meter
products.desc: Non-magnetic impeller IoT water meter — interference-resistant, remote data transmission.
products.overview: The HWM Non-magnetic IoT Water Meter uses a proprietary non-contact electronic sensing element that eliminates reliance on magnetic sensing. This makes it completely immune to strong-magnet tampering attacks — one of the most common forms of meter fraud. Liquid crystal display shows reading, battery status and signal strength. Bi-directional NB-IoT / 4G communication.

specs.label: Sensing method
specs.value: Non-contact electronic sensor (no reed switch); direct impulse reading

products.name: HWM IC Card Intelligent Water Meter
products.desc: Prepaid IC card smart water meter. Pay-before-use, automatic valve control by balance, anti-counterfeiting, low-voltage protection.
products.overview: The HWM IC Card Smart Water Meter enables prepaid water metering using an IC card. Users top up at any service station; the meter automatically closes the valve when the balance runs out. Usage history can be checked on the card. Manages over-pressure alarms, anti-tamper detection and remote valve control. Suitable for residential communities, schools, hotels and industrial parks.

specs.label: Prepaid function
specs.value: IC card prepaid; alarm at 5 m³ remaining (configurable); auto valve closure

products.name: HWM Electronic Remote Water Meter
products.desc: Photoelectric infrared direct-reading remote water meter via M-Bus/RS485. No accumulated error, no continuous power required.
products.overview: The HWM Photo Series uses a non-contact photoelectric absolute encoder to read the mechanical counter directly, with no mechanical linkage drift. Data is transmitted via M-Bus bus concentrator or 4G/NB-IoT network. Ultra-low power draw — battery life exceeds 6 years. Fully sealed electronic section prevents corrosion. Compatible with hot water supply as well.

specs.label: Reading method
specs.value: Photoelectric direct reading (infrared non-contact dial scanning)

specs.label: Communication
specs.value: M-Bus / RS485; concentrator via 4G or NB-IoT for remote reading

products.name: HWM IoT Valve Controlled Water Meter
products.desc: IoT valve-controlled water meter, NB-IoT/4G, remote valve open/close, flow limiting, IP68 three-chamber, 6+ year battery.
products.overview: The HWM Valve IoT Water Meter integrates NB-IoT / 4G communication with a built-in motorised valve for remote open/close control. Applications include district water management, leakage detection, automated shut-off for non-payment, and pressure management. Battery powered by high-energy-density Li-SOCl₂, rated for over 6 years of continuous service.

specs.label: Valve control
specs.value: Remote open/close / flow limiting via NB-IoT / 4G

products.name: HWM Large-diameter Vertical IoT Water Meter
products.desc: Large-diameter vertical spiral-wing IoT water meter. DN50~DN200, R200, NB-IoT/4G, IP68, optional valve control.
products.overview: The HWM Vertical Large-diameter IoT Water Meter is specifically designed for high-flow applications: industrial manufacturing, municipal water supply and urban residential mains. Vertical-axis spiral wing design. Accurate at low flow rates. Suitable for filters with fine and coarse filtration. Optional valve control for remote shut-off. NB-IoT / 4G wireless.

specs.label: Valve control (optional)
specs.value: Integrated electric valve: remote open/close, flow limiting

products.name: HWM Large-diameter Horizontal IoT Water Meter
products.desc: Large-diameter horizontal spiral-wing IoT water meter, DN40–DN250, R50, NB-IoT/4G, IP68. High adaptability to complex environments.
products.overview: The HWM Horizontal Large-diameter IoT Water Meter uses a new-generation microprocessor to measure water volume in large horizontal mains, then transmit data via NB-IoT / 4G for remote billing and management. The dual-way communication supports valve control addition. Compatible with direct reading cameras (HWC) for alternate reading methods.

specs.label: Valve control (optional)
specs.value: Integrated electric valve for remote control

products.name: HWU Small Ultrasonic IoT Water Meter
products.desc: Small-diameter IoT ultrasonic water meter, DN15–DN40, R250/R400, picosecond chip, IP68, RS485/M-Bus/NB-IoT/LoRa/4G.
products.overview: The HWU Small-diameter Ultrasonic IoT Water Meter uses transit-time ultrasonic technology — no moving parts, no wear, long service life. Picosecond-resolution chips measure flow starting from near-zero rates. Stores 24 daily / 360 monthly / 192 hourly records. Real-time monitoring of battery, temperature, flow and pipe status alerts. Supports RS485 / M-Bus / NB-IoT / LoRa / 4G.

specs.label: Flow DN15 (R250)
specs.value: Min: 2.4 L/h; Transitional: 10 L/h; Max: 2,500 L/h; Overload: 3,125 L/h

specs.label: Flow DN20 (R250)
specs.value: Min: 4 L/h; Transitional: 16 L/h; Max: 4,000 L/h; Overload: 5,000 L/h

specs.label: Flow DN25 (R250)
specs.value: Min: 6.4 L/h; Transitional: 25 L/h; Max: 6,300 L/h; Overload: 7,875 L/h

specs.label: Flow DN32 (R250)
specs.value: Min: 10.2 L/h; Transitional: 40 L/h; Max: 10,000 L/h; Overload: 12,500 L/h

specs.label: Flow DN40 (R250)
specs.value: Min: 16 L/h; Transitional: 64 L/h; Max: 16,000 L/h; Overload: 20,000 L/h

products.name: HWU Large-diameter Ultrasonic IoT Water Meter
products.desc: Large-diameter IoT ultrasonic water meter, DN40–DN300, R50, no moving parts, 15–20 year lifespan, NB-IoT/4G/M-Bus/RS485, IP68.
products.overview: The HWU Large-diameter Ultrasonic IoT Water Meter applies the same transit-time ultrasonic principle to larger pipes. No moving parts — service life typically 15–20 years with low maintenance cost. Low start-up flow rate (0.0015 m³/h). Intelligent features include flow volume alarm, leakage alert, abnormal flow detection and remote meter reading. Multi-channel configuration available.

products.name: HWC IoT Camera Direct Reading Module
products.desc: AI camera module for small mechanical meter retrofit. >99% image recognition accuracy, LPWAN+NB-IoT, IP68, 6-year battery life.
products.overview: The HWC IoT Camera Direct-reading Module uses AI image recognition based on deep learning to read any mechanical water meter dial — no replacement of the original meter needed. Accuracy rate >99%. Reading in <3 seconds. Detachable from the meter for easy replacement. Combined LPWAN network (NB-IoT gateway) to reduce infrastructure cost. Battery life up to 6 years.

products.name: HGCA IoT Camera Gateway
products.desc: IoT camera gateway for HWC modules. 16-node capacity, 470–510 MHz LPWAN, Li battery, 2 MB local storage.
products.overview: The HGCA IoT Camera Gateway is a concentrator for HWC camera direct-reading modules. It collects data wirelessly from up to 16 nodes (HWC modules), aggregates readings and transmits to the cloud via 4G. Compact form factor for wall or tight-space mounting. Bluetooth for on-site inspection and verification. IP67 rated.
